scripts.lint:apex: sh -c 'if ! command -v sf >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo "Skipping Apex analysis: sf CLI not found"; exit 0; fi; if ! sf plugins list | grep -q code-analyzer; then echo "Installing @salesforce/sfdx-scanner plugin..."; sf plugins install @salesforce/sfdx-scanner --force; fi; mkdir -p .artifacts/code-analysis && sf scanner run --target force-app --format sarif --outfile .artifacts/code-analysis/results.sarif || true'
scripts.test: npm run test:lwc:ci && npm run test:apex
scripts.test:apex: sh -c 'if ! grep -R --include="*.cls" -qi "@isTest" force-app/main/default/classes 2>/dev/null; then echo "Skipping Apex tests: no local Apex test classes found"; exit 0; fi; if ! command -v sf >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo "Skipping Apex tests: sf CLI not found"; exit 0; fi; if ! sf org display --json >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo "Skipping Apex tests: no default target org configured"; exit 0; fi; sf apex run test --test-level RunLocalTests --wait 30 --result-format human'
scripts.validate: npm run lint && npm run prettier:verify && npm run test:lwc:ci && npm run test:apex
